name: 24/7 Golf Academy
about: 24/7 Golf Academy is a state-of-the-art 4,500+ sq ft facility focused on golf instruction, practice, and club services. The academy operates 24/7 and offers Trackman simulator rentals, private lessons with expert coaches, and a 24-hour membership program. Their services are designed for players of all ages to refine skills and develop a lifelong passion for the game.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive junior programs and US Kids Golf tournaments
Custom club fitting and repair services on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line radar-based launch monitor for tracking shots and ball flight

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs. The academy also offers custom club fitting services and sales if you need new equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify any food and beverage services or policies, so it's best to assume outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole round on a simulator typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the number of players in your group and your pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy has dedicated junior programs, US Kids Golf tournaments, and a youth academy designed specifically for young golfers.
